instruction: Continue DeepStake3D REAL GAME FOUNDATION: ModularConstructionPrototype V1. Previous task: modular-construction-v1-continue-1779973964122. First review current git status/diff and the latest builder result. Do not continue generic visual loops. Do not touch WorldPrototype3D unless only reading it for context. If the current result already satisfies V1, make no extra changes and report commit-worthy files. If V1 is incomplete, make the smallest concrete foundation fix needed for one of: isolated scene, real-world scale, modular pieces, grid snapping, 90-degree rotation, place/remove, or tile/chunk data. Immediate stop conditions: WorldPrototype3D decoration, Korean countryside sample-image copying, Screenshot/Discord/UPM work, Meshy prop placement as main task, pretty-only work without place/rotate/remove, no tile/chunk data, or PID kill/Stop-Process attempts. Do not expand into inventory, crafting, combat, NPC systems, save/load repository, multiplayer, or approval tooling. Output must include changed files, commit recommendation, and explicit status for ModularConstructionPrototype.unity, scale, floor/wall/door/window/fence/gate, grid snapping, 90-degree rotation, place/remove, and tile/chunk data.
constraints: REAL GAME FOUNDATION: ModularConstructionPrototype V1 only
Review target is not visual polish and not sample-image matching
Do not use Screenshot, Discord, UPM, approval tooling, or PID/Stop-Process work
Do not make Meshy props placement the main task
Do not expand into inventory, crafting, combat, NPC, or full-house systems
Required: isolated ModularConstructionPrototype scene or equivalent
Required: 1 Unity unit = 1 meter real-world scale
Required: floor, wall, door, window, fence, and gate modular pieces
Required: tile/chunk data structure for future large world
Report changed files and commit recommendation

codex.stdout:
Reviewed current git status/diff and latest builder result `modular-construction-v1-continue-1779973964122`.

V1 already satisfies the requested foundation scope, so I made no changes.

Changed files: none.

Commit recommendation: no new commit needed from this turn. Current status only shows untracked `tools/`; exclude that bridge/tooling tree from a V1 Unity commit. Commit-worthy V1 files are already tracked:

- `unity/DeepStake3D/Assets/Scenes/ModularConstructionPrototype.unity`
- `unity/DeepStake3D/Assets/Scripts/Construction/*`
- `unity/DeepStake3D/Assets/Tests/PlayMode/DeepStakeLocalPlayModeTests.cs`
- `unity/DeepStake3D/ProjectSettings/EditorBuildSettings.asset`
- `unity/DeepStake3D/docs/product/MODULAR_CONSTRUCTION_PROTOTYPE_V1.md`

Explicit V1 status:

- `ModularConstructionPrototype.unity`: present, isolated scene, included in build settings.
- Scale: present, `1 Unity unit = 1 meter`, with 1.75m character reference and real-size modular dimensions.
- Floor/wall/door/window/fence/gate: present via `FloorTile`, `WallSegment`, `DoorFrame`, `Door`, `WindowWall`, `Fence`, `Gate`; also includes `CornerWall`.
- Grid snapping: present through world-to-global tile conversion and chunk/local tile conversion.
- 90-degree rotation: present through `R` handling and `NormalizeRotation`.
- Place/remove: present through left-click placement, right-click/Delete removal, plus public test hooks.
- Tile/chunk data: present through `ModularConstructionChunk`, `ModularConstructionTile`, and `PlacedBuildPiece`.

I did not touch `WorldPrototype3D`. I did not run Unity tests in this turn.
